message:
fix(index): use doc_id strings for search dedup, fix rewrite error path

Bug 2: resolve_sorted_entries was using doc_id_hash (u64) as the
HashSet key for deduplication. Two documents with the same FNV-1a hash
would silently drop one from results. Switch to actual doc_id strings
for both the WAL-vs-main suppression set and the seen-dedup set. The
performance cost is negligible for typical result set sizes.

Bug 3 (leftover): The previous commit wrapped rewrite_index in a
closure for temp file cleanup but called e.clone() on SearchError,
which does not implement Clone (it contains Box<dyn Error>). Fix by
using result? after the cleanup block instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
